upasargachandrika.example_text: 'saM paramAn samavamAnaTo sandyAmi maDyamAn' (aTarva॰6.103.2) sandyAmi baDnAmItyarTaH sampUrvo dyatirbanDane vartata iti sAyaRaH
'sandAnaM vo bfhaspatiH' (aTarva॰6.103.1) sandAnaM banDanam
'uttizWatamAraBeTAmAdAnasandAnAByAm' (aTarva॰11.9.3) sandAnaM banDanarajjuH
'vimfLIkAya te mano raTIraSvaM na sanditam gIrBirvaruRa sImasi' (f॰1.25.3) sanditam badDam (svasTAne syandane vA) visImasi=visinumaH=vizitaM kurmaH
'sanditAya svAhA valgate svAhA' (vA॰saM॰22.7)
'asanditAnAM sandAtA sanditAnAM ca mokzakaH' (manu॰8.342) sandAtA bandDA sandyatestfci rUpam asanditAnAmabadDAnAmaSvAdInAm
'te devAH juzwAstanUH priyARi DAmAni sArDaM samavadadire' (Sa0 brA0 3428)
'AjyAnyeva gfhRAnA juzwAstanUH priyARi DAmAni sArDaM samavadyante' (Sa0 brA0 3429) uBayatra samavadyatiravadAya KaRqAnkalpayitvA saNgrahaRe vartate
'sarvasya samavadAya juhoti' (tE0 brA0 1382)
'savye samavadAya' (kA0 SrO0 5919) vAme pARO KaRqAnsaMgfhyetyAha
'yA na imAH priyAstanuvastAH samavadyAmahE' (tE0 saM0 6221) samavadyAmahE samavadyAma ekatra saNGI kurmaH
'hfdayasyEvAgre'vadyati' (Sa0 brA0 31516) hfdayAMSaM praTamaM KaRqayatItyarTaH
'sarvaBakzyApUpakandamUlaPalamAMsAdIni dantErnAvadyet' (bO0 Da0 27128) KaRqayet=nApacCindyAt dantaKaRqitAvaSizwaM punarBakzaRAya nAdadItetyarTaH
'ava stomeBI rudaM dizIya' (f0 2335) (krudDaM) rudraM SamayeyamityAha
'yAM rAtriM brahmacArI samiDaM nAharatyAyuza eva tAmavadAya vasati' (Sa0 brA0 11331) avadAya=aMSaM CittvA
'vaSAyA avadAnAnAM taTEva tezAmavadAnam' (Sa0 brA0 4528) avadAnamavaKaRqanam
'nAnavattamaSnIyAt' (SAM0 gf0 21423) anavattamapfTakkftadevatABAgam
'tvaM cApi dakzayajYesminnavadAnArTamAgataH' (Sivapu0 223652) avadAnaM havirBAgaH
'vidAnAd vidyud vidyatyenaM sarvasmAtpApmanaH (Sa0 brA0 14871) vidyati Binatti viyuNkte viyOti vipfRakti ityanarTAntaram
'somaM vidyadBirgrAviBiH sutam' (vA0 sa0 264) vidyadBiH piMzadBiH
'atiprasaNge viditya kfzRastAn vArayAmAsa' (hari0 8435) vidAyeti tu pARinIyAH vivAdAspadasya vastunontaM kftvetyarTaH
'vi ca hEvAsya pApmAnaM dyataH' (tE0 brA0 31091) vidyataH=vicCintaH
'AdAnena sandAnenAmitrAnA dyAmasi' (aTarva0 61041) AdyAmasi=AdyAmaH=saMcUrRayAmaH
'aDA sapatnAnmAmakAn agnestejoBirAdizi' (aTarva0 13130) uktacara evArTaH
'tAnagna A dyA tvam' (aTarva0 61042) AdyA=Adya AbaDAna
'sA brahmajyaM devapIyuM brahmagavyAdIyamAnA mftyoH paqvISa A dyati' (aTarva0 12515) ukto'rTaH
'caranvatso ruSanniha nidAtAraM na vindate' (f0 8725) nidAtAraM bandDAram
'nidAya vatsam' (tE0 A0 489) nidAya sandAya badDvA
'SunaScicCepaM niditaM sahasrAd yUpAdamuYcaH' (f0 527) niditaM sanditaM sandAnitaM badDam
'uditA yo niditA veditA vasvA yajYiyo vatartati' (f0 810311) niditAni pracCannaguptAni vasUni
'udusriyARAmasfjannidAnam' (f0 6322) nidAnaM vatsadAma gavAM banDanamamuYcadityarTaH
'tAsAM nicikyuH kavayo nidAnam' (f0 101142) nidAnamAdikAraRam
'bAlajena nidAnena' (BA0 anu0 944)
'kumBIM SAKApavitramaBiDAnO nidAne dArupAtraM dohanamayaspAtram…' (Apa0 SrO0 14116) nidAne gopAdasambanDinyO rajjU iti rudradattaH
'yajamAno vA eza nidAnena' (E0 brA0 211 Sa0 brA0 12412) nidAnena mUlataH tattvataH yATArTyena
'yatpaSuH agnirvA eza nidAnena yadAgnIDraH' (Sa0 brA0 44218) ukto'rTaH
'Binadmi muzkAvapi dyAmi SepaH' (aTarva0 4377) apidyAmi avadyAmi viSasAmi

'badDe sandAnitaM mUtamudditaM sanditaM sitam ityamaraH udditaM sanditaM badDam ucCabdaH samo'rTe same tuddAnabanDane ityamaraH iha gajabanDanamuddAnamuktam uddAte kriyamARe tu matsyAnAM tatra rajjuBiH' (BA0 SAM0 13714) uddAnaM banDanam udyAnamiti pAWAntaram
'mA no BavAnbahoranantasyAparyantasyAByavadAnyo BUt' (Sa0 brA0 149110) aByavadAnya AcCettA pramozakaH kartari kftyaH
'puroqASaM samantaM paryavadyati' (tE0 saM0 2324) parito'vadyati avadAnaM karotItyAha
'samarTasyEvAsAmarTyaM virudDamiti cenna upasandAnajIvitvAtsAmarTyasya' (kA0 pra0 750 pradIpe) upasandAnaM sambanDaH
